planned_range: external review and post-review closure remain pending
deferred_boundaries: arbitrary HTTP methods, headers, bodies, cookies, or broad network access
broad filesystem writes, deletes, moves, chmod, archive extraction, or secrets-manager tools
remote MCP hosting or network MCP transport
managed model serving or LLM proxy workflows
external audit anchoring and hosted supply-chain signing
